scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @agritech/api" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @agritech/api" "npm run dev:worker --workspace @agritech/api" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agritech/api && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @agritech/api && npm run lint --workspace web
